holdings.infoBox: FHIL is an equity ETF with a total of 84 individual holdings. The top holdings are AstraZeneca stock at 3.51%, ASML Holding at 2.88%, HSBC Holdings at 2.25%, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company at 2.22%, and Air Liquide at 2.20%.

overview.description: The Federated Hermes International Leaders ETF (FHIL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund primarily focuses on non-US value companies from developed markets by employing fundamental company analysis and valuation disciplines. The actively managed ETF still reserves the flexibility to invest in companies from the US and emerging market countries. FHIL was launched on Jun 17, 2026 and is issued by Federated Hermes.
